The system provides a backend service that manages blood type alert configurations.
It exposes RESTful API endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting blood type alert operations.
Administrators can configure thresholds and triggers for blood type shortage notifications through the interface.
When an alert operation is defined, the system can automatically generate notifications when blood stock falls below set levels.
This module handles the lifecycle of blood supply warning rules within the hospital management platform.
